/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/GeometryApp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/circle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/rectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/square.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/shape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeometryApp.dir/shapefactory.cpp.o -o GeometryApp.app/Contents/MacOS/GeometryApp -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
